intent: NoJobs flood root cause = Gemini OUTPUT truncation at maxOutputTokens=8192. Large digests echo a long tracking URL into every job's jobUrl, blowing past 8192 -> finishReason=MAX_TOKENS -> truncated JSON array w/ no closing ] -> extractor regex returns null -> [] -> NoJobs. FIX: drop URL/anchor injection + jobUrl entirely (user does not rely on these tracking-redirect URLs; wants title/company/location/details/salary), harden parser to salvage truncated arrays, log finishReason. Do NOT raise maxOutputTokens (input already condensed to pure text 1.8k-7k chars; output bloat was the only problem).
scope: src/features/job-finder/extractor.js (buildExtractionPrompt: remove URL+anchor sections + jobUrl from schema; field mapping; harden truncated-array parser), src/core/api-service.js (log finishReason / detect MAX_TOKENS), tests-local/
evidence_replay: 5 NoJobs emails replayed vs gemini-2.5-flash-lite: 3 failed with finishReason=MAX_TOKENS / candidateTokens pinned 8192 / truncated array no ]; 2 succeeded (smaller output). cleanedTextLen 1.8k-7k (input not the issue). Confidence gate / double-Unknown / HTML-strip / 30000 input cap / 429 all ruled out.
